nodes.label: AI as rubber-ducky troubleshooting plus
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of subpar ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as a sort of rubber-ducky troubleshooting Plus, where I can bounce ideas off it. It usually doesn't have ideas that are quite up to snuff

nodes.label: AI as instant subject matter expert
nodes.grounding_span: chat GPT can become a sort of instant subject matter expert about anything I need it to be

nodes.label: AI as assistant for grunt work
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of generic unoriginal output
nodes.grounding_span: AI works as an improvisational crutch, so I don't have to be quite so quick with my thinking

nodes.label: AI as calculator-like tool requiring user competence
nodes.grounding_span: it is no more a collaboration than doing math on a calculator is

nodes.label: AI enabling laziness vs quality craftsmanship
nodes.label_negative: AI as enabler of poor quality work
nodes.grounding_span: AI has allowed me to be lazier. This is not necessarily a pro or con about AI itself, but rather how you use it

nodes.label: AI as cultural and linguistic reference tool
nodes.grounding_span: an LLM more insidiously lets us export our linguistic reasoning

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to current tool-like role
nodes.grounding_span: I am hopeful, optimistic even, that AI will actually be closer to a collaborative partner

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it is a time saver when used correctly

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I would not be happy with the reduction in quality of my work

nodes.label: Societal cognitive health and critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: knowing how to speak and what to speak, is integral to being a functioning adult

nodes.label: Immersive storytelling and player experience
nodes.grounding_span: create some amazing ambiance on the future

nodes.label: Openness to AI handling more grunt work
nodes.grounding_span: it is a time saver when used correctly

nodes.label: Frustration with AI output quality
nodes.grounding_span: It requires a lot of specific prompting, otherwise it tends to cycle through the same annoying generic names

nodes.label: Confidence in AI as collaborator not threat
nodes.grounding_span: I would hesitate to call it a collaboration at all

nodes.label: Concern about AI-induced laziness
nodes.grounding_span: AI is going to make people lazy if we aren't exceedingly careful

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I am hopeful, optimistic even, that AI will actually be closer to a collaborative partner

nodes.label: Learning-by-doing with just-in-time expert consultation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to just jump into a system and learn it on the go, preferably from someone who already knows it

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: with further refinements of the ideas, both by careful AI prompting and good old fashioned thinking about it in the shower
